M2430_HOSP_UK M2430 Hospital Reason- Reason Unknown This field indicates the reason the patient required hospitalization was unknown. 0 = Not Checked (Not Unknown), 1 = Checked (Unknown) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2430_HOSP_RSPRTRY_INFCTN M2430 Hospital Reason- Respiratory Infection This field indicates the reason the patient required hospitalization was due to respiratory infection. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2430_HOSP_SCHLD_TRTMT M2430 Hospital Reason- Scheduled
